titleStmt.title: SII 20.331: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 331. (B.K. No. 45 of 1935-36.) LAKSHMĒŚVAR, SHIRHATTI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Left pillar at the eastern entrance into the Sōmēśvara temple.

summary.p: This record in characters of about the 13th century is dated the cyclic year Ānanda, Mārgaśira, dvitīya-paksha. The details cannot be verified.
The inscription records the renovation of the temple of Sōmanātha by Guru Nāgēśvara who is said to have hailed from Saurāshṭra. The record is in faulty Sanskrit language.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© śrī varadaliṁgāya namaḥ . śrī sōmanāthāya namaḥ . śrī guru nāgēśvarā
ya namō namaḥ . saurāṣṭrādhipatē kimūgata vada tvaṁ pauṁḍarīkaḥ purē . yāta
sthānaruhādhipattyamamama bhāktyādihiṁsya krutaṁ yētasmin sudriḍhatvaśakti
saṁpadabhaktyā yitatpāgata tasmātkāraṇatatvamāgatamahōttasthā
namadhyōdbhavaṁ . sōmēśvarasya sukhabhōgasuraṁgapaukhyaṁ prāgādhipadbhuvana
kādivicitracitrā vēsyādimandirasamūhasarōvarākhyaṁ krutvā krutatī
bhuktiyutādarēva . krutvā purādibhavamandirasābhirāmaṁ hatvā tavābja
nayanādikrutaṁtarūpaubhitvā tavābdhigataviṁsanarādhipatvaṁ gatvāga
maṁ vinasruṇā kāraṇēti . jīrnnōddhārakrutē kimēti vada mē sarāga mārayya
druptābdhānōdbūtakaḷāvivēśasivadharmmōddhāradāuvasati kāru(ṁ)ṇya
krupāṁbhōti tava mē krutvā na hitvaṁ kadabēlyācatvakrutē tava stirabhuvana
ścaṁdrārkkabhūyaścirēṇa . dēvēśa dēva salilastitacaṁdracūḍa dāvā
naḷasya sitamitra sulōcanasya pīyūṣakaṁṭhadharamasti sirō
jamūlā dēvīṣahatkṟupadadāti sukhaściratvaṁ . nāgēsā
ryyākhiḷāgamādipasutagñānōdarasthakrutaṁ yōgābdaśya
dadērgiriśatayugasāhasramēkāṁtayōgānaṁdābda
tanāṁgamārggasirapakṣa dvitīyaḥ śubhē jīrnnōddhāra ciraṁ bhavaṁ
ti gurusōmēśvarājyasthiraṁ . bhō nāgapasyakhiḷabhōga suputra pau
traṁ dēśādhipattya gurubhakti śivārccanasya dāmnōddharasya dṟiḍhaci
ttaciraṁtamayutē brahmādipūjitadadātvari
sōmē . sōmēśvarabhōgaciraṁta saṁgamēśvararājyasthiramakku nā
gappasyāyustiraṁ bhavati . maṁgaḷa mahā śrī śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 20.331 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
